name: README.md - charlie947/social-media-skills
snippet:
Social Media Skills for AI Agents . The complete set of Claude skills behind Charlie Hills' content system. ... AI-generated infographic based on the post content.
What are Skills? Skills are markdown files that give AI agents specialised knowledge and workflows for specific tasks. When you install these in your project, Claude recognises when you're working on a social media task and applies the right patterns, voice rules, and platform constraints.

Project files: written by skills, live in one specific project Step 1: Create a Cowork project Open the Claude desktop app and switch to Cowork. Start a new project and name it something like “Content system” or “Newsletter writer”. This project is the home for your voice files, your instructions, and every future draft.
